productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men Solid Navy Blue Track Pants
description: Composition Navy blue track pants made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, with flattened seams, spandex for more stretch, reinforced tear points, printed main label, soft and broad elasticated waist with a drawcord, side pockets and embroidered brand logo below left pocket Fit Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately in warm water not more than 40 degrees, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Flat dry in shade Enjoy those mind-calming sessions of yoga in style and comfort in this urban yoga pants. Made of pure, sweat absorbent and stretchable cotton, this piece is stitched with flat seams and a printed label to prevent irritation, allowing you to concentrate on your yoga activity. With reinforced tear points, be assured that this pants will stay with you for years, while the grippy garment ensures it doesn't slip and cause discomfort when you exercise. The soft waistband with a drawcord allows you to customise the fit. Team this with urban yoga tops for ultimate comfort. Model statistics The product is of length 43" on a model of height: 6'2" waist 32" and hips 35"
